name: pounce-solver
summary: Python interface to POUNCE — a pure-Rust interior-point optimization solver for nonlinear, conic (LP/QP/SOCP/SDP/exp/power), and global problems (NLP core ported from Ipopt). cyipopt-style Problem class, scipy-style minimize() facade, solve_qp/solve_socp/sos_minimize, and JAX-friendly autodiff / implicit differentiation.
